g.text: STEP 1 u2014 Find the leaf page
STEP 2 u2014 Write to WAL FIRST
STEP 3 u2014 Modify the leaf page in-place (in memory)
STEP 4 u2014 Background checkpoint flushes dirty page to disk

text.tspan: (may be cache miss u2192 random disk read)

g.text: append: page=L6 insert key=55 at slot 5

text.tspan: (later) write 8KB page to its on-disk location
u2192 RANDOM I/O (cost amortized by batching)
update parent (which may also split, recursively)
u2192 more WAL entries + more page modifications
